title: salvia phlomoides subsp. boissieri
intro: Salvia phlomoides subsp. boissieri is a subspecies of the Salvia phlomoides plant, which is a type of sage plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Salvia phlomoides subsp. boissieri are attributed to its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cognitive function, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
